H3_retest_high_dim.verdict: H3 SUPPORTED in high-dim: the shared-worker hierarchy reproduces all N assets at ~6.0x fewer rules than the flat (no-sharing) description, at equal fidelity — exactly the compression Phase-2 said needs a high-dim env.

learned_anchor_frontier.note: LEARNED (PPO) policy on the high-dim env — the apples-to-apples-with-R6c/P22 trained anchor
